introSection: Dragon Fly is a steel roller coaster located at Duinrell in Wassenaar, Zuid-Holland, Netherlands. It opened on 31 March 2012.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Dragon Fly crosses over the Kikkerachtbaan roller coaster. The track is painted brown and the supports are painted such that they look like natural wood - the same colour scheme as the nearby Falcon. The ride finishes with a helix.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Riders are secured by individual lap bars.

fullText:
Dragon Fly is a steel roller coaster located at Duinrell in Wassenaar, Zuid-Holland, Netherlands. It opened on 31 March 2012.

Dragon Fly crosses over the Kikkerachtbaan roller coaster. The track is painted brown and the supports are painted such that they look like natural wood - the same colour scheme as the nearby Falcon. The ride finishes with a helix.

Riders are secured by individual lap bars.
